free_text: /by Authors/.The Data For Ni-58 and Au-197 have Been
Published in Earlier Papers, See Rel-Ref.
A Self-Supporting Foil Enriched to 96% Mo-100,Thickness
.The Detector Telescope Consisted of a 1000 Mum
Si(DEL'TA E) Detector, Followed by a 75*125 mm
NaI(E) Detector. Correction For Reaction Loss from the
NaI Detector were Performed on the Del'Ta E Versus
.A Systematic Error in the Cross Section
.The Uncertainty is Shown by Authors on Figures.
